comparison.label: The Difference
comparison.intro: Personal care shouldn't feel like an assembly line. See how Dr. Ehrlich's approach compares to large online clinics.

about.label: Meet Your Doctor
about.title: Dr. Timothy Ehrlich
paragraphs: Dr. Timothy Ehrlich began his medical career as a general and advanced laparoscopic surgeon, spending the majority of his early years in practice as a bariatric surgeon. That work demanded technical precision under pressure and a deep understanding of patient physiology, anatomy, and long-term outcomes. The surgical foundation he built during that period — operative judgment, fine motor skill, and a results-driven mindset — continues to shape every procedure he performs today.

After years in high-acuity surgery, Dr. Ehrlich transitioned into hair restoration, a field that allowed him to apply his surgical expertise to elective, life-improving work rather than emergency care. He has now performed more than 4,000 hair transplant procedures, giving him a depth of experience that few practitioners in the field can match. Each case is approached with the same standards of planning, sterility, and craftsmanship he developed in the operating room, with a focus on natural-looking, durable results.
His approach is simple: treat every patient the way he'd want to be treated. That means honest conversations, individualized treatment plans, and a physician who genuinely cares about your outcomes.

steps.title: Reach Out
steps.description: Fill out the contact form. Tell him what you're interested in — hair, weight, hormones, or a combination.

steps.title: Consultation
steps.description: Dr. Ehrlich will personally review your information, discuss your goals, and — if needed — order at-home lab work to understand your baseline.

steps.title: Your Treatment Plan
steps.description: Receive a personalized treatment plan designed around your specific needs, labs, and goals. No cookie-cutter protocols.

steps.title: Ongoing Care
steps.description: Monthly check-ins, quarterly reviews, and direct access to Dr. Ehrlich whenever you need it. Your care doesn't stop at the prescription.

pricing.label: Pricing

pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. No surprise charges. Just honest care.
pricing.note: Payment accepted via Zelle and Venmo. Additional payment options available upon request.
